content.scenarioHint: 你需要确认会议室在上午十点是否可用，首先你应该问：
expectedAnswers: Do you have any smaller rooms open at 10 AM?
上午十点有小会议室吗？
evaluationCriteria: 是否正确表达了询问意图
是否符合英语口语习惯

content.scenarioHint: 场景提示：用户通常在需要信息时先提问
expectedAnswers: Is the conference room available on Thursday at 2 PM?
Is the big meeting room free on Thursday afternoon?
Can I book the conference room on Thursday at 2 PM?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯

content.speakerText: Is the video conferencing room free next Monday at 11 AM?
content.speakerTextCn: 下周一上午十一点视频会议室有空吗？
expectedAnswers: Let me check... Yes, it’s free! But we’re also offering the new collaboration zone if you need extra screens.
It’s booked until noon — would 12:30 be okay?
Sorry, it’s reserved all day. How about the small meeting pod at 1 PM?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰回应可用性，主动提供替代方案
语言准确性：使用正确时态（is free, is booked, would...be）和连接结构
表达自然度：使用口语化缩略和自然转折（But, How about）
关键词覆盖：使用 'free', 'booked', 'available', 'how about', 'alternative room' 等关键词
